visa_types.name: Visiting Relatives
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/sweden/myanmar/english/pdf/passport-collection1.pdf).
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3KFlwQZg9JE3fKlv9hr0qB/b5efd29f54b290cdcd97a0d5270bc868/Application_for_Schengen_Visa_English.pdf) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- All Myanmar language documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

Schengen Visa Application Form ( Eng ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5F9Fd3EChsm8hMc6ASbAuB/7e17605c10f203712235aa1b0b457dc6/119031_blvisa_en.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form ( SV ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dChLwQ6YQzgqXEIF8F1Sh/7eaeee493049dfc461cca9d8ae76bcab/118031_blvisa_sv.pdf)
Invitation Form in Eng (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4v8Jy76TOWvO41lQR7EXOs/636c023f23d46c1c8f009e8840d841ff/Invitation-for-visit.pdf) 
Invitation Form in SV (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/596ZYovesCuVSiIUR79hZz/a08324295fa0f986963719014731d213/Invitation-for-visit-sv.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting their family or relatives in Sweden. The referent has to fill out an invitation form called appendix E. The applicant who would like to
                                                                        apply for Sweden Visa do not need to book an advance appointment.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting their family or relatives in Sweden. The referent has to fill out an invitation form called appendix E. The applicant who would like to
                                                                        apply for Sweden Visa do not need to book an advance appointment.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Visiting Relatives]

## Documents Required
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/sweden/myanmar/english/pdf/passport-collection1.pdf).
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3KFlwQZg9JE3fKlv9hr0qB/b5efd29f54b290cdcd97a0d5270bc868/Application_for_Schengen_Visa_English.pdf) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- All Myanmar language documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear Of high quality with no ink marks or creases
Please be reminded that a photograph with the visa application is only compulsory for:
- children 12 years old and below
and if the applicant does not appear in person at time of lodgment but have biometrics stored in their previous
- Schengen visa sticker within the last 59 months
- Other applicants are not required to submit a photograph with their application if they do not have one at time of lodgment.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form ( Eng ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5F9Fd3EChsm8hMc6ASbAuB/7e17605c10f203712235aa1b0b457dc6/119031_blvisa_en.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form ( SV ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dChLwQ6YQzgqXEIF8F1Sh/7eaeee493049dfc461cca9d8ae76bcab/118031_blvisa_sv.pdf)
Invitation Form in Eng (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4v8Jy76TOWvO41lQR7EXOs/636c023f23d46c1c8f009e8840d841ff/Invitation-for-visit.pdf) 
Invitation Form in SV (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/596ZYovesCuVSiIUR79hZz/a08324295fa0f986963719014731d213/Invitation-for-visit-sv.pdf)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
- Tourist
- Visiting Friends (Incl. Girlfriend / Boyfriend)
- Visiting Relatives
- Business or Conference
Required documents for all visa types
Please note that the following essentials must be met by all applicants submitting their applications for visa.
Passport or other valid travel document should be valid at least three months beyond the planned departure from Sweden. Please note that The Embassy of Sweden in Bangkok does not accept additional pages
                                                        inserted into passports. Ensure Passport has at least two blank pages to which a visa can be affixed, if not a new passport must be obtained before submitting your application.
Relevant Forms & Photograph Fully completed application form appropriate to the type of visa and supplementary form requested with two original passport-size photographs [NB: digital photographs
                                                        not acceptable]
An authorized translation must be attached to any documents in Myanmar 
Other Information:
Visa for Applicants under the age of 18
- In addition to the compulsory documentation required, the following documentation is required for applicants under the age of 18.
- The application form needs to be signed by a legal custodian
- Birth certificate for the applicant
- Consent from both parents to travel abroad. If the applicant is under custody of only one parent a certificate showing this is required. The documentation needs to be in original and issued by the
                                                            legal Thai authorities. The documentation also needs to be supported by the custodian's id-cards
Required Travel Insurance 
A medical insurance is compulsory for visitors to Sweden and other Schengen states. You may provide either a policy from an insurance company based in Europe or in Thailand. Please note that only certain
                                                        insurance companies in Thailand are accepted. The insurance must cover at least 30,000 Euro and include costs for medical treatment, hospitalization and repatriation due to injury or medical reasons.
                                                        The insurance must be valid in all Schengen states and cover the total length of the visit. 
The reimbursement from the insurance company must be payable in any EU-country, Switzerland and Lichtenstein. The insurance certificate must be shown when the application is submitted. Please note that
                                                        you have to bring your travel insurance with you when travelling due to inspections of relevant documents at the border control when entering the Schengen area.
visa_types.full_text:
- Tourist
- Visiting Friends (Incl. Girlfriend / Boyfriend)
- Visiting Relatives
- Business or Conference
Required documents for all visa types
Please note that the following essentials must be met by all applicants submitting their applications for visa.
Passport or other valid travel document should be valid at least three months beyond the planned departure from Sweden. Please note that The Embassy of Sweden in Bangkok does not accept additional pages
                                                        inserted into passports. Ensure Passport has at least two blank pages to which a visa can be affixed, if not a new passport must be obtained before submitting your application.
Relevant Forms & Photograph Fully completed application form appropriate to the type of visa and supplementary form requested with two original passport-size photographs [NB: digital photographs
                                                        not acceptable]
An authorized translation must be attached to any documents in Myanmar 
Other Information:
Visa for Applicants under the age of 18
- In addition to the compulsory documentation required, the following documentation is required for applicants under the age of 18.
- The application form needs to be signed by a legal custodian
- Birth certificate for the applicant
- Consent from both parents to travel abroad. If the applicant is under custody of only one parent a certificate showing this is required. The documentation needs to be in original and issued by the
                                                            legal Thai authorities. The documentation also needs to be supported by the custodian's id-cards
Required Travel Insurance 
A medical insurance is compulsory for visitors to Sweden and other Schengen states. You may provide either a policy from an insurance company based in Europe or in Thailand. Please note that only certain
                                                        insurance companies in Thailand are accepted. The insurance must cover at least 30,000 Euro and include costs for medical treatment, hospitalization and repatriation due to injury or medical reasons.
                                                        The insurance must be valid in all Schengen states and cover the total length of the visit. 
The reimbursement from the insurance company must be payable in any EU-country, Switzerland and Lichtenstein. The insurance certificate must be shown when the application is submitted. Please note that
                                                        you have to bring your travel insurance with you when travelling due to inspections of relevant documents at the border control when entering the Schengen area.

visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/sweden/myanmar/english/pdf/passport-collection1.pdf).
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- All Myanmar language documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference. The applicant who would like to
                                                                    apply for Sweden Visa do not need to book an advance appointment.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference. The applicant who would like to
                                                                    apply for Sweden Visa do not need to book an advance appointment.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Tourist]

## Documents Required
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/sweden/myanmar/english/pdf/passport-collection1.pdf).
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- All Myanmar language documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear Of high quality with no ink marks or creases
Please be reminded that a photograph with the visa application is only compulsory for:
- children 12 years old and below
and if the applicant does not appear in person at time of lodgment but have biometrics stored in their previous
- Schengen visa sticker within the last 59 months
- Other applicants are not required to submit a photograph with their application if they do not have one at time of lodgment.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form ( Eng ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5F9Fd3EChsm8hMc6ASbAuB/7e17605c10f203712235aa1b0b457dc6/119031_blvisa_en.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form ( SV ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dChLwQ6YQzgqXEIF8F1Sh/7eaeee493049dfc461cca9d8ae76bcab/118031_blvisa_sv.pdf)

visa_types.documents_required:
Seafarer Joining Vessel (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/46KD2OEFwLo0hPrlF90f2Y/6174a1721d2d7e9273c5b72db234c80d/checklist_yangon_seafarer_new.pdf)

- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3KFlwQZg9JE3fKlv9hr0qB/b5efd29f54b290cdcd97a0d5270bc868/Application_for_Schengen_Visa_English.pdf) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Schengen Visa Application Form ( SV ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dChLwQ6YQzgqXEIF8F1Sh/7eaeee493049dfc461cca9d8ae76bcab/118031_blvisa_sv.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the SwedenEmbassy in Bangkok for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled
Only seamen who are nationals from a country which is required to have a valid visa to enter the Schengen space need to apply for a seamen transit visa and if they intend to join a ship that is (or will be) in a Schengen port, land with the aim of join another ship that is (or will arrive) in a Schengen port, or land due to sickness, repatriation, holiday and so on.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
When you apply for a visa, the application will be forwarded to the SwedenEmbassy in Bangkok for processing. All cases are considered individually to see if the conditions for granting a visa are fulfilled
Only seamen who are nationals from a country which is required to have a valid visa to enter the Schengen space need to apply for a seamen transit visa and if they intend to join a ship that is (or will be) in a Schengen port, land with the aim of join another ship that is (or will arrive) in a Schengen port, or land due to sickness, repatriation, holiday and so on.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Seafarer  ]

## Documents Required
Seafarer Joining Vessel (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/46KD2OEFwLo0hPrlF90f2Y/6174a1721d2d7e9273c5b72db234c80d/checklist_yangon_seafarer_new.pdf)

- Submitted application and supporting documents shall be printed in A4 size.
To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3KFlwQZg9JE3fKlv9hr0qB/b5efd29f54b290cdcd97a0d5270bc868/Application_for_Schengen_Visa_English.pdf) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear Of high quality with no ink marks or creases
Please be reminded that a photograph with the visa application is only compulsory for:
- children 12 years old and below
and if the applicant does not appear in person at time of lodgment but have biometrics stored in their previous
- Schengen visa sticker within the last 59 months
- Other applicants are not required to submit a photograph with their application if they do not have one at time of lodgment.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form ( Eng ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5F9Fd3EChsm8hMc6ASbAuB/7e17605c10f203712235aa1b0b457dc6/119031_blvisa_en.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form ( SV ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6dChLwQ6YQzgqXEIF8F1Sh/7eaeee493049dfc461cca9d8ae76bcab/118031_blvisa_sv.pdf)

Please be reminded that a photograph with the visa application is only compulsory for:
- children 12 years old and below
and if the applicant does not appear in person at time of lodgment but have biometrics stored in their previous
- Schengen visa sticker within the last 59 months
- Other applicants are not required to submit a photograph with their application if they do not have one at time of lodgment.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer
